Fixed by changing to `YYYY-MM-DD`.\n\n## Phase 2 Implementation — Chroma Chunking\n\n### Core Changes to `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js`:\n\n1. Added `RESET_COLLECTIONS = process.argv.includes('--reset')` constant\n2. Added `totalChunks: 0` to auditLog state\n3. Added --reset logic in `main()` to delete collections before recreating\n4. Added `chunkText(text, maxChars=3000, overlap=300)` function:\n   - Short text (≤ maxChars): returns as single chunk\n   - Splits by `\\n\\n+` paragraph boundaries\n   - Force-splits oversized paragraphs with overlap\n   - Overlap: `overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para` for next chunk\n   - Returns `chunks.length > 0 ? chunks : [text.substring(0, maxChars)]`\n5. Updated `processDocument()`: replaced `body.substring(0, 5000)` with `chunkText(body)`, loops over chunks, upserts each as `${baseId}-c${i}`\n6. Updated `ingestProjectVault()`: same chunking pattern\n7. Updated report to show totalChunks and multi-chunk doc count\n8. Exported `chunkText` from module.exports\n\n### validate-phase-16.js Test 6 added:\n- Short text: single chunk passthrough\n- Long text: splits into ≥2 chunks\n- Overlap: chunk[1].startsWith(tail) or includes first 50 chars\n- Content coverage: totalChars >= source chars\nResult: 10/10 passes\n\n**Commit f43a996**: \"vault health: fix links, orphaned notes, and Chroma chunking\"\n\n## Documentation — Chroma Operational Notes\n\nUser asked: \"Add this 'Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma' and similar things to the appropriate documents so future AI know\"\n\n### Changes made:\n\n**`Vault/02-Technologies/Chroma-Indexing.md`** — Added two new sections:\n1. \"Current Implementation (Phase 16 — as of 2026-06-11)\": actual chunking strategy (3000 chars, 300 overlap), chunk ID format (`doc-{slug}-c{n}`), npm commands\n2. \"Operational Runbook\": starting fresh, routine re-index, after a chunking schema change (with --reset note and history note about pre/post-2026-06-11 ID format)\n\n**`Vault/10-Known-Problems/Problem-Chroma-stale-chunk-ids.md`** — New file:\n- type: knownproblem, status: open (note: tried \"workaround\" first but validator rejected it)\n- Documents: symptoms, root cause (upsert never deletes changed IDs), impact, workaround (`npm run ingest -- --reset`), permanent fix (delta ingestion with tombstoning)\n\n**Error:** First tried `status: workaround` in the Known Problem file — vault-validator rejected it as invalid status. Fixed to `status: open`.\n\n**Commit 508285c**: \"docs: document Chroma chunking ops runbook and stale-chunk-id known problem\"\n\n## Push\n\nUser: \"Push everything\" → `git push` → `b5c47d1..508285c main -> main`\n\n## /code-review\n\nUser ran `/code-review` command. The review scope was the last 2 commits (HEAD~2..HEAD) since everything was already pushed.\n\n7 parallel finder agents were launched (Angles A-G):\n\n### Findings surfaced:\n\n4 findings were sent to verifiers, all returned CONFIRMED:\n\n1. **Overlap chunk exceeds maxChars** (line 193): `current = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para` can reach 3,301 chars when maxChars=3,000. Two 2,800-char paras → para1 fills current (2,800), para2 triggers split: new current = 300+2+2800 = 3,102 chars.\n\n2. **Sequential per-chunk upserts** (lines 137-144): SDK accepts arrays (`ids: string[]`, `documents: string[]`, `metadatas: Metadata[]`). All chunks could be batched into one `col.upsert()` call.\n\n3. **--reset silently ignored for --project-vault** (line 469): `ingestProjectVault()` never checks `RESET_COLLECTIONS`; `--project-vault` branch calls it directly bypassing `main()`.\n\n4. **auditLog.totalChunks not updated on partial failure** (line 146): `auditLog.totalChunks += chunks.length` only reached after loop completes; mid-loop throw leaves orphaned chunks uncounted.\n\nPlus 2 confirmed cleanup findings:\n5. Redundant `if (pos >= para.length) break` in force-split while loop\n6. Dead `|| longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))` in overlap test\n\n## Plan for Code Review Fixes\n\nPlan written to `i-have-a-few-zesty-milner.md` (overwriting previous vault health plan):\n\nFix 1: Overlap guard — after building `newCurrent`, if `newCurrent.length > maxChars`, flush `overlapText` as own chunk and set `current = para`\nFix 2: Batch upsert — collect all chunk data, one `col.upsert()` per document\nFix 3: Pass `reset` param to `ingestProjectVault()`, delete collection if reset=true\nFix 4: Resolved by Fix 2 (single atomic upsert)\nFix 5: Remove redundant break\nFix 6: Remove dead OR, downgrade warn→fail, add bounds assertion\n\n## Code Review Fixes Implementation\n\nAll 6 fixes applied to `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js` and `.claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js`:\n\n### Fix 1 — chroma-ingest.js, `chunkText()`:\n```js\nif (candidate.length > maxChars && current) {\n  chunks.push(current);\n  const overlapText = current.slice(-overlap);\n  const newCurrent = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para;\n  // Guard: overlap + separator + para can exceed maxChars; flush overlap\n  // as its own small chunk and start fresh with just the paragraph.\n  if (newCurrent.length > maxChars) {\n    if (overlapText) chunks.push(overlapText);\n    current = para;\n  } else {\n    current = newCurrent;\n  }\n}\n```\n\n### Fix 2 — `processDocument()` batch upsert:\n```js\n// Batch all chunks in one call — avoids N sequential round-trips per document\nawait col.upsert({\n  ids:       chunks.map((_, i) => `${baseId}-c${i}`),\n  documents: chunks,\n  metadatas: chunks.map((_, i) => ({ ...meta, chunk_index: i, chunk_total: chunks.length })),\n});\nauditLog.totalChunks += chunks.length;\n```\n\n### Fix 2 — `ingestProjectVault()` batch upsert:\n```js\nawait col.upsert({\n  ids:       chunks.map((_, i) => `${baseId}-c${i}`),\n  documents: chunks,\n  metadatas: chunks.map((_, i) => ({ ...meta, chunk_index: i })),\n});\nprojectLog.ingested++;\n```\n\n### Fix 3 — `ingestProjectVault()` signature + reset logic:\n```js\nasync function ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, reset = false) {\n  // ...\n  if (reset) {\n    try { await client.deleteCollection({ name: collectionName }); console.log(`   ⚠️  --reset: deleted ${collectionName}`); }\n    catch { /* collection may not exist yet */ }\n  }\n  const col = await client.getOrCreateCollection({ name: collectionName, embeddingFunction: ef });\n```\n\nEntry point updated: `ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, RESET_COLLECTIONS)`\n\n### Fix 5 — Removed redundant break:\n```js\n// BEFORE:\nwhile (pos < para.length) {\n  chunks.push(para.substring(pos, pos + maxChars));\n  pos += maxChars - overlap;\n  if (pos >= para.length) break;  // REMOVED\n}\n```\n\n### Fix 6 — validate-phase-16.js, Test 6:\n```js\n// BEFORE:\nif (longChunks[1].startsWith(tail) || longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))) {\n  this.pass('Overlap detected: chunk[1] contains tail of chunk[0]');\n} else {\n  this.warn('Overlap not detected — verify chunkText overlap logic manually');\n}\n\n// AFTER:\nif (longChunks[1].startsWith(tail)) {\n  this.pass('Overlap detected: chunk[1] starts with tail of chunk[0]');\n} else {\n  this.fail('Overlap missing: chunk[1] does not start with last 300 chars of chunk[0]');\n}\n\n// ADDED: bounds assertion\nconst allWithinBounds = longChunks.every(c => c.length <= 3000);\nif (allWithinBounds) {\n  this.pass('All chunks are within maxChars=3000 limit');\n} else {\n  const oversized = longChunks.filter(c => c.length > 3000).map(c => c.length);\n  this.fail(`Chunks exceed maxChars: ${oversized.join(', ')} chars`);\n}\n```\n\n**Results:** 11/11 tests pass (validate-phase-16.js), full npm test suite all pass.\n**Commit 661a92f** pushed: \"fix: address 6 code-review findings in chroma-ingest chunking\"\n\n## Key Architecture Notes\n\n- **Project:** App Builder Framework — modular foundation for AI agents and human developers\n- **Vault:** Obsidian-based knowledge store in `Vault/` directory, tracked in git\n- **Chroma:** Vector DB running in Docker (`app-builder-chroma`, port 8000), persistence in `docker/volumes/chroma/`\n- **Collections:** `global-standards`, `ai-software-factory-facts`, `ai-software-factory-sessions`\n- **Scripts:** `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js`, `.claude/scripts/context-assembly.js`, `.claude/scripts/vault-validator.js`\n- **Chunk ID format (post 2026-06-11):** `doc-{slug}-c{n}` (was `doc-{slug}`)\n- **npm commands:** `npm run ingest`, `npm run ingest -- --reset`, `npm run doctor`, `npm test`\n- **Git state:** Clean, all pushed to origin/main (661a92f is HEAD)\n\n## User Messages (all)\n1. Initial question about vault handling, pushing, structure, Chroma indexing, linking, orphaned notes\n2. \"Add this Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma and similar things to the appropriate documents so future ai know\"\n3. \"Push everything\"\n4. /code-review (command)\n5. \"Anything else?\" (after code review, while in plan mode)\n6. Primary Request and Intent:\n\nThe user initiated a comprehensive audit and improvement session for the App Builder Framework's Vault knowledge system and Chroma vector database indexing pipeline. Specific requests:\n\n- **Initial audit**: How is the Vault being handled? What gets pushed vs kept locally? How should it be structured for optimal retrieval? Should Chroma indexing be updated? Is everything linking properly? Are there standalone/orphaned notes?\n- **Documentation**: \"Add this 'Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma' and similar things to the appropriate documents so future AI know\"\n- **Push**: \"Push everything\" → pushed all commits to origin/main\n- **/code-review**: Ran code review on the chunking changes, surfacing 6 confirmed findings\n- **\"Anything else?\"**: User approved the fix plan after code review; all 6 fixes were implemented and pushed\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n\n- **App Builder Framework**: Modular foundation for AI agents and human developers; CLAUDE.md governs all operations\n- **Obsidian Vault** (`Vault/`): 14-category knowledge store (00-Inbox through 14-Agent-Memory plus Templates), tracked in git; machine-state and embeddings gitignored\n- **Chroma Vector DB**: Running via Docker (`app-builder-chroma`, port 8000), persistence at `docker/volumes/chroma/`; 3 collections: `global-standards`, `ai-software-factory-facts`, `ai-software-factory-sessions`\n- **chromadb JS SDK**: Uses `@chroma-core/default-embed` (ADR-INFRA-003); replaced broken v1/v2 HTTP calls\n- **Text chunking**: Paragraph-aware overlapping chunks (3,000 chars max, 300 overlap); chunk IDs format `doc-{slug}-c{n}`\n- **vault-validator.js**: Validates YAML frontmatter; required fields: type, status (valid enum), last_updated (YYYY-MM-DD)\n- **`--reset` flag**: Wipes Chroma collections before re-ingesting; needed after chunk ID scheme changes\n- **Batch upsert**: chromadb SDK `upsert()` accepts arrays (`ids: string[]`, `documents: string[]`, `metadatas: Metadata[]`)\n- **ADR-INFRA-003**: Documents chromadb JS SDK decision\n- **ADR-DATA-001**: Chroma collection schema, facts/sessions separation\n- **Known Problems system**: `Vault/10-Known-Problems/` with type: knownproblem, valid statuses: open, resolved, in_progress, wont_fix (NOT \"workaround\")\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n\n- **`.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js`** — Core ingestion pipeline, heavily modified:\n  - Added `RESET_COLLECTIONS = process.argv.includes('--reset')` at module level\n  - Added `totalChunks: 0` to auditLog\n  - Added --reset collection deletion in `main()` before `getOrCreateCollection`\n  - Added `chunkText(text, maxChars=3000, overlap=300)` function (exported)\n  - Updated `processDocument()`: replaced `body.substring(0,5000)` with batched chunk upsert\n  - Updated `ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, reset=false)`: same batching + reset param\n  - Fixed: overlap guard prevents chunks from exceeding maxChars\n  - Fixed: redundant `break` removed from force-split while loop\n  - Entry point passes `RESET_COLLECTIONS` to `ingestProjectVault()`\n\n  Final `chunkText` function:\n  ```js\n  function chunkText(text, maxChars = 3000, overlap = 300) {\n    if (text.length <= maxChars) return [text];\n    const paragraphs = text.split(/\\n\\n+/);\n    const chunks = [];\n    let current = '';\n    for (const para of paragraphs) {\n      if (para.length > maxChars) {\n        if (current) { chunks.push(current); current = ''; }\n        let pos = 0;\n        while (pos < para.length) {\n          chunks.push(para.substring(pos, pos + maxChars));\n          pos += maxChars - overlap;\n        }\n        continue;\n      }\n      const sep = current ? '\\n\\n' : '';\n      const candidate = current + sep + para;\n      if (candidate.length > maxChars && current) {\n        chunks.push(current);\n        const overlapText = current.slice(-overlap);\n        const newCurrent = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para;\n        if (newCurrent.length > maxChars) {\n          if (overlapText) chunks.push(overlapText);\n          current = para;\n        } else {\n          current = newCurrent;\n        }\n      } else {\n        current = candidate;\n      }\n    }\n    if (current) chunks.push(current);\n    return chunks.length > 0 ? chunks : [text.substring(0, maxChars)];\n  }\n  ```\n\n  Final batch upsert in `processDocument()`:\n  ```js\n  await col.upsert({\n    ids:       chunks.map((_, i) => `${baseId}-c${i}`),\n    documents: chunks,\n    metadatas: chunks.map((_, i) => ({ ...meta, chunk_index: i, chunk_total: chunks.length })),\n  });\n  auditLog.totalChunks += chunks.length;\n  ```\n\n  `ingestProjectVault` signature: `async function ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, reset = false)`\n\n- **`.claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js`** — Phase 16 validator, Test 6 updated:\n  - Removed dead `|| longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))` branch\n  - Changed `this.warn` to `this.fail` for overlap detection failure\n  - Added bounds assertion: `longChunks.every(c => c.length <= 3000)`\n  - Now 11/11 tests pass (was 10/10)\n\n- **`Vault/02-Technologies/Chroma-Indexing.md`** — Added two sections at the end:\n  - \"Current Implementation (Phase 16 — as of 2026-06-11)\": actual chunking strategy, chunk ID format, npm commands\n  - \"Operational Runbook\": starting fresh, routine re-index, after schema change (--reset note with history), health checks\n\n- **`Vault/10-Known-Problems/Problem-Chroma-stale-chunk-ids.md`** — New file documenting:\n  - Pre/post-2026-06-11 ID format change (`doc-{slug}` → `doc-{slug}-c{n}`)\n  - Symptoms: duplicate results, missing chunk metadata\n  - Workaround: `npm run ingest -- --reset`\n  - Permanent fix: delta ingestion with tombstoning (not yet implemented)\n\n- **`Vault/INDEX.md`** — Added `[[04-Workflows/GETTING-STARTED.md\\|Getting Started]]` to 04-Workflows table row; updated last_updated to 2026-06-11\n\n- **`Vault/STATUS.md`** — Changed plain text to `[[../04-Workflows/GETTING-STARTED.md|GETTING-STARTED.md]]` link in Phase 18 section\n\n- **`Vault/03-Projects/Registry.md`** — Added row: `| Home Media Server | personal | server | project-home-media-server | planning | 2026-06-10 | — |`\n\n- **`Vault/06-Research/README.md`** — Fixed broken `[[Other-Research.md]]` → `[[Other-Research.md|Replace with actual related research file path]]`\n\n- **`Vault/03-Projects/Project-Ideas.md`** — Added YAML frontmatter: type: index, status: active, last_updated: 2026-06-11, author: Krystian Garcia, chroma_collection: ai-software-factory-sessions, tags: [ideas, projects, backlog], related: [Registry.md, ../04-Workflows/GETTING-STARTED.md]\n\n- **`Vault/Templates/Skill.md`** — Changed `last_updated: {{today}}` → `last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD`\n\n- **`Vault/09-Requirements/AI Software Factory/2026-06-09-phase-16-search-quality-design.md`** — Moved from root of 09-Requirements via git mv; frontmatter added by vault-validator auto-migration\n\n- **`Vault/09-Requirements/AI Software Factory/2026-06-10-getting-started-guide-design.md`** — Same move\n\n4. Errors and fixes:\n\n- **vault-validator rejected `status: workaround`** in `Problem-Chroma-stale-chunk-ids.md`: Valid statuses are draft, active, deprecated, review, accepted, approved, current, complete, proposed, open, in_progress, resolved, wont_fix. Fixed by changing to `status: open`.\n\n- **vault-validator rejected `last_updated: {{today}}`** in `Vault/Templates/Skill.md`: Template placeholder failed YYYY-MM-DD format check. Fixed by changing to `last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD`.\n\n- **Code review finding — overlap chunk exceeds maxChars**: Original `current = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para` could produce 3,301 chars when maxChars=3,000. Fixed with guard: build `newCurrent`, if it exceeds maxChars flush overlapText as own chunk and set `current = para`.\n\n- **Code review finding — sequential upserts**: N `await col.upsert()` calls per document. Fixed by collecting all chunk data into arrays and calling `col.upsert()` once per document (SDK supports arrays).\n\n- **Code review finding — `--reset` ignored for `--project-vault`**: `ingestProjectVault()` never checked `RESET_COLLECTIONS`. Fixed by adding `reset = false` parameter and deleting the collection if `reset=true`.\n\n- **Code review finding — dead test OR branch**: `|| longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))` would pass on repetitive text even without real overlap, and masked failures. Removed, changed warn→fail.\n\n5. Problem Solving:\n\n- **Vault health**: Identified and fixed 7 structural issues: broken link, orphaned notes, missing Registry entry, unlinked workflow guide, loose req files, missing frontmatter, template placeholder. vault-validator went from 99.43% → 100% (176/176).\n\n- **Chroma retrieval quality**: Replaced 5,000-char silent truncation with overlapping paragraph-aware chunking. Each vault document now produces properly sized, overlapping chunks with `chunk_index`/`chunk_total` metadata. IDs use `doc-{slug}-c{n}` format.\n\n- **Operational knowledge preservation**: The `--reset` migration note and complete operational runbook are now in `Vault/02-Technologies/Chroma-Indexing.md` and a Known Problem file, ensuring future AI sessions know when and how to run resets.\n\n- **Stale orphan problem**: Documented that any environment that ran ingest before 2026-06-11 has old `doc-{slug}` IDs alongside new `doc-{slug}-c{n}` IDs. Solution: `npm run ingest -- --reset` once.\n\n- **Code review bug fixes**: All 6 confirmed findings from /code-review addressed in commit 661a92f. The batch upsert fix also resolved the partial-failure audit gap (Fix 4) as a side effect.\n\n6. All user messages:\n\n- \"I have a few questions. How is the vault getting handled? What's getting pushed? What's kept locally? How should it be structured for optimal retrieval? Should we update the chroma indexing? Is everything linking properly? Are there standalone notes that aren't linked to anything? Add to the concerns I'm bringing up and let's make a plan to tackle these\"\n- \"Add this Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma and similar things to the appropriate documents so future ai know\"\n- \"Push everything\"\n- `/code-review` (command invocation)\n- \"Anything else?\" (asked while in plan mode after code review; triggered plan for 6 fixes)\n- \"CRITICAL: Respond with TEXT ONLY. Do NOT call any tools...\" (current summary request)\n\n7. Pending Tasks:\n\nNo explicitly pending tasks. All approved work has been completed and pushed. The following were noted as \"Do Later / requires discussion\":\n- **Phase 3 (Delta ingestion)**: Hash-based change detection in `chroma-ingest.js` to skip unchanged documents; freshness check in `npm run doctor`\n- **Phase 4 (Retrieval quality)**: Ingest agent memory + relationships into Chroma (currently loaded from disk), add metadata filtering to `assembleContext()`, add retrieval quality canary test, define retrospective retention policy for `08-Retrospectives/`\n\n8. Current Work:\n\nThe most recent completed work was implementing all 6 code review findings from `/code-review` against the chunking changes in commit f43a996. The fixes were applied to `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js` and `.claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js`, verified with `node .claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js` (11/11 passes) and `npm test` (all suites pass), then committed as `661a92f` and pushed to `origin/main`.\n\nThe 6 fixes were:\n1. Overlap guard in `chunkText()` — prevents chunks from exceeding maxChars\n2. Batch upsert in `processDocument()` — one `col.upsert()` per document with array args\n3. Batch upsert in `ingestProjectVault()` — same pattern\n4. `--reset` propagated to `ingestProjectVault()` — add `reset=false` param, delete collection if true, pass `RESET_COLLECTIONS` from entry point\n5. Removed redundant `break` in force-split while loop\n6. Removed dead OR branch in Test 6 overlap assertion, changed warn→fail, added bounds assertion\n\nFinal git state: `main` branch, HEAD at `661a92f`, clean working tree, pushed to `https://github.com/KJG54/App-Builder.git`.\n\n9. Dead `|| longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))` in overlap test\n\n## Plan for Code Review Fixes\n\nPlan written to `i-have-a-few-zesty-milner.md` (overwriting previous vault health plan):\n\nFix 1: Overlap guard — after building `newCurrent`, if `newCurrent.length > maxChars`, flush `overlapText` as own chunk and set `current = para`\nFix 2: Batch upsert — collect all chunk data, one `col.upsert()` per document\nFix 3: Pass `reset` param to `ingestProjectVault()`, delete collection if reset=true\nFix 4: Resolved by Fix 2 (single atomic upsert)\nFix 5: Remove redundant break\nFix 6: Remove dead OR, downgrade warn→fail, add bounds assertion\n\n## Code Review Fixes Implementation\n\nAll 6 fixes applied to `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js` and `.claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js`:\n\n### Fix 1 — chroma-ingest.js, `chunkText()`:\n```js\nif (candidate.length > maxChars && current) {\n  chunks.push(current);\n  const overlapText = current.slice(-overlap);\n  const newCurrent = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para;\n  // Guard: overlap + separator + para can exceed maxChars; flush overlap\n  // as its own small chunk and start fresh with just the paragraph.\n  if (newCurrent.length > maxChars) {\n    if (overlapText) chunks.push(overlapText);\n    current = para;\n  } else {\n    current = newCurrent;\n  }\n}\n```\n\n### Fix 2 — `processDocument()` batch upsert:\n```js\n// Batch all chunks in one call — avoids N sequential round-trips per document\nawait col.upsert({\n  ids:       chunks.map((_, i) => `${baseId}-c${i}`),\n  documents: chunks,\n  metadatas: chunks.map((_, i) => ({ ...meta, chunk_index: i, chunk_total: chunks.length })),\n});\nauditLog.totalChunks += chunks.length;\n```\n\n### Fix 2 — `ingestProjectVault()` batch upsert:\n```js\nawait col.upsert({\n  ids:       chunks.map((_, i) => `${baseId}-c${i}`),\n  documents: chunks,\n  metadatas: chunks.map((_, i) => ({ ...meta, chunk_index: i })),\n});\nprojectLog.ingested++;\n```\n\n### Fix 3 — `ingestProjectVault()` signature + reset logic:\n```js\nasync function ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, reset = false) {\n  // ...\n  if (reset) {\n    try { await client.deleteCollection({ name: collectionName }); console.log(`   ⚠️  --reset: deleted ${collectionName}`); }\n    catch { /* collection may not exist yet */ }\n  }\n  const col = await client.getOrCreateCollection({ name: collectionName, embeddingFunction: ef });\n```\n\nEntry point updated: `ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, RESET_COLLECTIONS)`\n\n### Fix 5 — Removed redundant break:\n```js\n// BEFORE:\nwhile (pos < para.length) {\n  chunks.push(para.substring(pos, pos + maxChars));\n  pos += maxChars - overlap;\n  if (pos >= para.length) break;  // REMOVED\n}\n```\n\n### Fix 6 — validate-phase-16.js, Test 6:\n```js\n// BEFORE:\nif (longChunks[1].startsWith(tail) || longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))) {\n  this.pass('Overlap detected: chunk[1] contains tail of chunk[0]');\n} else {\n  this.warn('Overlap not detected — verify chunkText overlap logic manually');\n}\n\n// AFTER:\nif (longChunks[1].startsWith(tail)) {\n  this.pass('Overlap detected: chunk[1] starts with tail of chunk[0]');\n} else {\n  this.fail('Overlap missing: chunk[1] does not start with last 300 chars of chunk[0]');\n}\n\n// ADDED: bounds assertion\nconst allWithinBounds = longChunks.every(c => c.length <= 3000);\nif (allWithinBounds) {\n  this.pass('All chunks are within maxChars=3000 limit');\n} else {\n  const oversized = longChunks.filter(c => c.length > 3000).map(c => c.length);\n  this.fail(`Chunks exceed maxChars: ${oversized.join(', ')} chars`);\n}\n```\n\n**Results:** 11/11 tests pass (validate-phase-16.js), full npm test suite all pass.\n**Commit 661a92f** pushed: \"fix: address 6 code-review findings in chroma-ingest chunking\"\n\n## Key Architecture Notes\n\n- **Project:** App Builder Framework — modular foundation for AI agents and human developers\n- **Vault:** Obsidian-based knowledge store in `Vault/` directory, tracked in git\n- **Chroma:** Vector DB running in Docker (`app-builder-chroma`, port 8000), persistence in `docker/volumes/chroma/`\n- **Collections:** `global-standards`, `ai-software-factory-facts`, `ai-software-factory-sessions`\n- **Scripts:** `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js`, `.claude/scripts/context-assembly.js`, `.claude/scripts/vault-validator.js`\n- **Chunk ID format (post 2026-06-11):** `doc-{slug}-c{n}` (was `doc-{slug}`)\n- **npm commands:** `npm run ingest`, `npm run ingest -- --reset`, `npm run doctor`, `npm test`\n- **Git state:** Clean, all pushed to origin/main (661a92f is HEAD)\n\n## User Messages (all)\n1. Initial question about vault handling, pushing, structure, Chroma indexing, linking, orphaned notes\n2. \"Add this Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma and similar things to the appropriate documents so future ai know\"\n3. \"Push everything\"\n4. /code-review (command)\n5. \"Anything else?\" (after code review, while in plan mode)\n6. Plan approved (implicit)\n7. CRITICAL: Respond with TEXT ONLY. Do NOT call any tools. (current summary request)\n</analysis>\n\n<summary>\n1. Primary Request and Intent:\n\nThe user initiated a comprehensive audit and improvement session for the App Builder Framework's Vault knowledge system and Chroma vector database indexing pipeline. Specific requests:\n\n- **Initial audit**: How is the Vault being handled? What gets pushed vs kept locally? How should it be structured for optimal retrieval? Should Chroma indexing be updated? Is everything linking properly? Are there standalone/orphaned notes?\n- **Documentation**: \"Add this 'Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma' and similar things to the appropriate documents so future AI know\"\n- **Push**: \"Push everything\" → pushed all commits to origin/main\n- **/code-review**: Ran code review on the chunking changes, surfacing 6 confirmed findings\n- **\"Anything else?\"**: User approved the fix plan after code review; all 6 fixes were implemented and pushed\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n\n- **App Builder Framework**: Modular foundation for AI agents and human developers; CLAUDE.md governs all operations\n- **Obsidian Vault** (`Vault/`): 14-category knowledge store (00-Inbox through 14-Agent-Memory plus Templates), tracked in git; machine-state and embeddings gitignored\n- **Chroma Vector DB**: Running via Docker (`app-builder-chroma`, port 8000), persistence at `docker/volumes/chroma/`; 3 collections: `global-standards`, `ai-software-factory-facts`, `ai-software-factory-sessions`\n- **chromadb JS SDK**: Uses `@chroma-core/default-embed` (ADR-INFRA-003); replaced broken v1/v2 HTTP calls\n- **Text chunking**: Paragraph-aware overlapping chunks (3,000 chars max, 300 overlap); chunk IDs format `doc-{slug}-c{n}`\n- **vault-validator.js**: Validates YAML frontmatter; required fields: type, status (valid enum), last_updated (YYYY-MM-DD)\n- **`--reset` flag**: Wipes Chroma collections before re-ingesting; needed after chunk ID scheme changes\n- **Batch upsert**: chromadb SDK `upsert()` accepts arrays (`ids: string[]`, `documents: string[]`, `metadatas: Metadata[]`)\n- **ADR-INFRA-003**: Documents chromadb JS SDK decision\n- **ADR-DATA-001**: Chroma collection schema, facts/sessions separation\n- **Known Problems system**: `Vault/10-Known-Problems/` with type: knownproblem, valid statuses: open, resolved, in_progress, wont_fix (NOT \"workaround\")\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n\n- **`.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js`** — Core ingestion pipeline, heavily modified:\n  - Added `RESET_COLLECTIONS = process.argv.includes('--reset')` at module level\n  - Added `totalChunks: 0` to auditLog\n  - Added --reset collection deletion in `main()` before `getOrCreateCollection`\n  - Added `chunkText(text, maxChars=3000, overlap=300)` function (exported)\n  - Updated `processDocument()`: replaced `body.substring(0,5000)` with batched chunk upsert\n  - Updated `ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, reset=false)`: same batching + reset param\n  - Fixed: overlap guard prevents chunks from exceeding maxChars\n  - Fixed: redundant `break` removed from force-split while loop\n  - Entry point passes `RESET_COLLECTIONS` to `ingestProjectVault()`\n\n  Final `chunkText` function:\n  ```js\n  function chunkText(text, maxChars = 3000, overlap = 300) {\n    if (text.length <= maxChars) return [text];\n    const paragraphs = text.split(/\\n\\n+/);\n    const chunks = [];\n    let current = '';\n    for (const para of paragraphs) {\n      if (para.length > maxChars) {\n        if (current) { chunks.push(current); current = ''; }\n        let pos = 0;\n        while (pos < para.length) {\n          chunks.push(para.substring(pos, pos + maxChars));\n          pos += maxChars - overlap;\n        }\n        continue;\n      }\n      const sep = current ? '\\n\\n' : '';\n      const candidate = current + sep + para;\n      if (candidate.length > maxChars && current) {\n        chunks.push(current);\n        const overlapText = current.slice(-overlap);\n        const newCurrent = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para;\n        if (newCurrent.length > maxChars) {\n          if (overlapText) chunks.push(overlapText);\n          current = para;\n        } else {\n          current = newCurrent;\n        }\n      } else {\n        current = candidate;\n      }\n    }\n    if (current) chunks.push(current);\n    return chunks.length > 0 ? chunks : [text.substring(0, maxChars)];\n  }\n  ```\n\n  Final batch upsert in `processDocument()`:\n  ```js\n  await col.upsert({\n    ids:       chunks.map((_, i) => `${baseId}-c${i}`),\n    documents: chunks,\n    metadatas: chunks.map((_, i) => ({ ...meta, chunk_index: i, chunk_total: chunks.length })),\n  });\n  auditLog.totalChunks += chunks.length;\n  ```\n\n  `ingestProjectVault` signature: `async function ingestProjectVault(vaultPath, collectionName, reset = false)`\n\n- **`.claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js`** — Phase 16 validator, Test 6 updated:\n  - Removed dead `|| longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))` branch\n  - Changed `this.warn` to `this.fail` for overlap detection failure\n  - Added bounds assertion: `longChunks.every(c => c.length <= 3000)`\n  - Now 11/11 tests pass (was 10/10)\n\n- **`Vault/02-Technologies/Chroma-Indexing.md`** — Added two sections at the end:\n  - \"Current Implementation (Phase 16 — as of 2026-06-11)\": actual chunking strategy, chunk ID format, npm commands\n  - \"Operational Runbook\": starting fresh, routine re-index, after schema change (--reset note with history), health checks\n\n- **`Vault/10-Known-Problems/Problem-Chroma-stale-chunk-ids.md`** — New file documenting:\n  - Pre/post-2026-06-11 ID format change (`doc-{slug}` → `doc-{slug}-c{n}`)\n  - Symptoms: duplicate results, missing chunk metadata\n  - Workaround: `npm run ingest -- --reset`\n  - Permanent fix: delta ingestion with tombstoning (not yet implemented)\n\n- **`Vault/INDEX.md`** — Added `[[04-Workflows/GETTING-STARTED.md\\|Getting Started]]` to 04-Workflows table row; updated last_updated to 2026-06-11\n\n- **`Vault/STATUS.md`** — Changed plain text to `[[../04-Workflows/GETTING-STARTED.md|GETTING-STARTED.md]]` link in Phase 18 section\n\n- **`Vault/03-Projects/Registry.md`** — Added row: `| Home Media Server | personal | server | project-home-media-server | planning | 2026-06-10 | — |`\n\n- **`Vault/06-Research/README.md`** — Fixed broken `[[Other-Research.md]]` → `[[Other-Research.md|Replace with actual related research file path]]`\n\n- **`Vault/03-Projects/Project-Ideas.md`** — Added YAML frontmatter: type: index, status: active, last_updated: 2026-06-11, author: Krystian Garcia, chroma_collection: ai-software-factory-sessions, tags: [ideas, projects, backlog], related: [Registry.md, ../04-Workflows/GETTING-STARTED.md]\n\n- **`Vault/Templates/Skill.md`** — Changed `last_updated: {{today}}` → `last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD`\n\n- **`Vault/09-Requirements/AI Software Factory/2026-06-09-phase-16-search-quality-design.md`** — Moved from root of 09-Requirements via git mv; frontmatter added by vault-validator auto-migration\n\n- **`Vault/09-Requirements/AI Software Factory/2026-06-10-getting-started-guide-design.md`** — Same move\n\n4. Errors and fixes:\n\n- **vault-validator rejected `status: workaround`** in `Problem-Chroma-stale-chunk-ids.md`: Valid statuses are draft, active, deprecated, review, accepted, approved, current, complete, proposed, open, in_progress, resolved, wont_fix. Fixed by changing to `status: open`.\n\n- **vault-validator rejected `last_updated: {{today}}`** in `Vault/Templates/Skill.md`: Template placeholder failed YYYY-MM-DD format check. Fixed by changing to `last_updated: YYYY-MM-DD`.\n\n- **Code review finding — overlap chunk exceeds maxChars**: Original `current = overlapText + '\\n\\n' + para` could produce 3,301 chars when maxChars=3,000. Fixed with guard: build `newCurrent`, if it exceeds maxChars flush overlapText as own chunk and set `current = para`.\n\n- **Code review finding — sequential upserts**: N `await col.upsert()` calls per document. Fixed by collecting all chunk data into arrays and calling `col.upsert()` once per document (SDK supports arrays).\n\n- **Code review finding — `--reset` ignored for `--project-vault`**: `ingestProjectVault()` never checked `RESET_COLLECTIONS`. Fixed by adding `reset = false` parameter and deleting the collection if `reset=true`.\n\n- **Code review finding — dead test OR branch**: `|| longChunks[1].includes(tail.substring(0, 50))` would pass on repetitive text even without real overlap, and masked failures. Removed, changed warn→fail.\n\n5. Problem Solving:\n\n- **Vault health**: Identified and fixed 7 structural issues: broken link, orphaned notes, missing Registry entry, unlinked workflow guide, loose req files, missing frontmatter, template placeholder. vault-validator went from 99.43% → 100% (176/176).\n\n- **Chroma retrieval quality**: Replaced 5,000-char silent truncation with overlapping paragraph-aware chunking. Each vault document now produces properly sized, overlapping chunks with `chunk_index`/`chunk_total` metadata. IDs use `doc-{slug}-c{n}` format.\n\n- **Operational knowledge preservation**: The `--reset` migration note and complete operational runbook are now in `Vault/02-Technologies/Chroma-Indexing.md` and a Known Problem file, ensuring future AI sessions know when and how to run resets.\n\n- **Stale orphan problem**: Documented that any environment that ran ingest before 2026-06-11 has old `doc-{slug}` IDs alongside new `doc-{slug}-c{n}` IDs. Solution: `npm run ingest -- --reset` once.\n\n- **Code review bug fixes**: All 6 confirmed findings from /code-review addressed in commit 661a92f. The batch upsert fix also resolved the partial-failure audit gap (Fix 4) as a side effect.\n\n6. All user messages:\n\n- \"I have a few questions. How is the vault getting handled? What's getting pushed? What's kept locally? How should it be structured for optimal retrieval? Should we update the chroma indexing? Is everything linking properly? Are there standalone notes that aren't linked to anything? Add to the concerns I'm bringing up and let's make a plan to tackle these\"\n- \"Add this Next time you run npm run ingest (with Docker up), use npm run ingest -- --reset once to clear the stale pre-chunking entries from Chroma and similar things to the appropriate documents so future ai know\"\n- \"Push everything\"\n- `/code-review` (command invocation)\n- \"Anything else?\" (asked while in plan mode after code review; triggered plan for 6 fixes)\n- \"CRITICAL: Respond with TEXT ONLY. Do NOT call any tools...\" (current summary request)\n\n7. Pending Tasks:\n\nNo explicitly pending tasks. All approved work has been completed and pushed. The following were noted as \"Do Later / requires discussion\":\n- **Phase 3 (Delta ingestion)**: Hash-based change detection in `chroma-ingest.js` to skip unchanged documents; freshness check in `npm run doctor`\n- **Phase 4 (Retrieval quality)**: Ingest agent memory + relationships into Chroma (currently loaded from disk), add metadata filtering to `assembleContext()`, add retrieval quality canary test, define retrospective retention policy for `08-Retrospectives/`\n\n8. Current Work:\n\nThe most recent completed work was implementing all 6 code review findings from `/code-review` against the chunking changes in commit f43a996. The fixes were applied to `.claude/scripts/chroma-ingest.js` and `.claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js`, verified with `node .claude/scripts/validate-phase-16.js` (11/11 passes) and `npm test` (all suites pass), then committed as `661a92f` and pushed to `origin/main`.\n\nThe 6 fixes were:\n1. Overlap guard in `chunkText()` — prevents chunks from exceeding maxChars\n2. Batch upsert in `processDocument()` — one `col.upsert()` per document with array args\n3. Batch upsert in `ingestProjectVault()` — same pattern\n4. `--reset` propagated to `ingestProjectVault()` — add `reset=false` param, delete collection if true, pass `RESET_COLLECTIONS` from entry point\n5. Removed redundant `break` in force-split while loop\n6. Removed dead OR branch in Test 6 overlap assertion, changed warn→fail, added bounds assertion\n\nFinal git state: `main` branch, HEAD at `661a92f`, clean working tree, pushed to `https://github.com/KJG54/App-Builder.git`.\n\n9. Optional Next Step:\n\nNo explicit next step requested. The user asked \"Anything else?\" which prompted the code review fix plan — that work is now complete. The conversation ended with the summary request.\n\nIf continuing, the natural next items from the earlier vault health plan (Phase 3/4, deferred) would be: delta/incremental ingestion with hash-based change detection in `chroma-ingest.js`, and a freshness check in `scripts/doctor.js`.
